DataListSpec.Name: HFHI CRM Model Scores And Ratings Update Data List
DataListSpec.Description: A data list showing hfhi crm modelscoresandratingsupdate records.
DataListSpec.Author: HFHCON-DEV\twillis

SPDataList.common:CreateProcedureSQL:
CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.USR_UFN_MODELSCORESFORCONSTITUENT_UPDATE ( @CONSTITUENTID UNIQUEIDENTIFIER ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( -- ADMA SELECT 'ADMA' AS MODELSCORETYPE, A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID AS ANALYTICSMODELID, A.VALUE AS SCORE, NULL AS MAXIMUMSCORE, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, NULL AS NAME FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTED1DBE44C8F734152BDED6C3723A96873 A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY M ON A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = M.ID WHERE M.ID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
-- SIMIO Mid-Level SELECT 'SIMIO - Mid Level' AS MODELSCORETYPE, A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID AS ANALYTICSMODELID, A.VALUE AS SCORE, NULL AS MAXIMUMSCORE, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, NULL AS NAME FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTE628D8C79C5354CDEBA04853FF4D1129C A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY M ON A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = M.ID WHERE M.ID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
-- SIMIO Net Worth SELECT 'SIMIO - Net Worth' AS MODELSCORETYPE, A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID AS ANALYTICSMODELID, CAST(A.SIMIONETWORTHPROPENSITYCODEID AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS SCORE, NULL AS MAXIMUMSCORE, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, NULL AS NAME FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTE992C22EE8AF24ABF8E6AEF796C9EFFBB A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY M ON A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = M.ID WHERE M.ID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
-- SIMIO Planned Giving SELECT 'SIMIO - Planned Giving' AS MODELSCORETYPE, A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID AS ANALYTICSMODELID, A.VALUE AS SCORE, NULL AS MAXIMUMSCORE, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, NULL AS NAME FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTEC14E96658FC544E0933F4DF1FA74CA6B A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY M ON A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = M.ID WHERE M.ID = @CONSTITUENTID );
